evidence.AC1: frontend and backend TypeScript pass via npx tsc --noEmit; frontend Vite app runs on 127.0.0.1:5173.
evidence.AC2: Dashboard renders table of forms from GET /api/forms with title, status, uploaded date, and Edit action for extraction-complete.
evidence.AC3: Upload page contains GOV.UK file upload control (id=file-upload) and posts multipart PDF to /api/forms/upload.
evidence.AC4: Playwright run confirmed redirect from /upload to /forms/:formId/edit after successful upload.
evidence.AC5: Editor loads via GET /api/forms/:formId and renders extracted fields as summary cards.
evidence.AC6: Playwright edited first field label, type, and required state; changes persisted through save endpoint.
evidence.AC7: Add field button increases rendered field rows by one and focuses newly added label input.
evidence.AC8: Remove field button triggers confirmation dialog and removes selected field after acceptance.
evidence.AC9: PUT /api/forms/:formId/fields returns updated schema; version increments and API re-read reflects saved edits.
evidence.AC10: Inputs and actions use GOV.UK classes/components: govuk-input/select/checkboxes/button/file-upload/error-summary.
evidence.AC11: Verified htmlFor/id association for upload and editor controls; labels are visibly rendered for all inputs.
evidence.AC12: GovLayout provides GOV.UK header, Beta phase banner, conditional back link, main content wrapper, and footer.
evidence.AC13: Simulated failed save using Playwright route interception; GOV.UK error summary displayed with failure message.
evidence.AC14: During delayed save interception, Save button entered disabled/loading state (disabled or aria-disabled and Saving text).
evidence.AC15: Playwright keyboard tab navigation reached interactive controls (links/buttons/inputs/selects) without pointer usage.

bugs.title: Backend port mismatch from evaluator standard
bugs.details: Backend health passed on port 3000 while port 4000 was unavailable. Not a Sprint 02 acceptance failure, but inconsistent with evaluator startup convention.
bugs.steps: curl http://127.0.0.1:4000/api/health returns no response; curl http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/health returns status ok.

recommendations: Standardize backend port to 4000 or explicitly document 3000 in sprint/runbook to avoid QA startup ambiguity.
Add automated Playwright regression covering upload->edit->save and simulated save failure to preserve keyboard/accessibility behavior.
Consider initializing govuk-frontend JS modules (initAll) for enhanced focus/error-summary behavior consistency.
